productDisplayName: Lotto Men Sprint Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for those who love those casual healthy runs, the lotto Sprint comes in a low-profile design with stylish brush prints, making it a fab everyday shoe.UpperLeather upper with stitch detailing and overlays for maximum breathability, durability and styleLacing system for a snug, customised FitMeshed and padded tongue, collar and inner lining for absolute sweat-free all-day comfortBrush stroked designs for styleMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionPadded footbed with enhanced cushioning under the heel for all-day comfort and shock-absorptionRemovable footbed to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleTPR outsole with terraced lugs throughout the mid length and circular lugs on the periphery of the forefoot and heel for maximum grip and tractionCurved midfoot for enhanced inner arch supportPunto flex on the mid forefoot for ease of movementSemi-circular grooves on the mid forefoot and midfoot for air cushioningOutsole reinforced onto the backfoot as a heel guardShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
